name: drizzle-postgres
description: Drizzle ORM over the Bun Postgres client, with drizzle-kit migrations
readme:
## Drizzle

`db` from `src/db/index.ts`. Tables go in `src/db/schema/`, one file per table, exported from `schema/index.ts`.

```sh
bun run db:generate   # migration from schema changes
bun run db:migrate    # apply
```

`pg` is dev-only for drizzle-kit; the app uses Bun's native client.
